queries.question: Show all exams and also show quizzes graded by Professor Smith.
queries.sql:
SELECT Exams.CourseTitle as title
FROM Exams JOIN Assessors ON Exams.AssessorId = Assessors.AssessorID
UNION
SELECT Quizzes.Description as title
FROM Quizzes JOIN Assessors ON Quizzes.AssessorId = Assessors.AssessorID
WHERE Assessors.name = "Professor Smith"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/education#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/education/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?o0 WHERE {
  {
    ?exams a :Exams .
    ?assessors a :Assessors .
    ?exams p:hasAssessors ?assessors .
    ?exams p:CourseTitle ?coursetitle .
    BIND(?coursetitle AS ?o0)
  }
  UNION
  {
    ?quizzes a :Quizzes .
    ?assessors a :Assessors .
    ?quizzes p:hasAssessors ?assessors .
    ?quizzes p:Description ?description .
    ?assessors p:name ?name_f .
    FILTER(STR(?name_f) = "Professor Smith")
    BIND(?description AS ?o0)
  }
}

queries.question: Show both exams graded by Professor Smith and quizzes graded by the same person.
queries.sql:
SELECT Exams.CourseTitle as title
FROM Exams JOIN Assessors ON Exams.AssessorId = Assessors.AssessorID
WHERE Assessors.name = "Professor Smith"
UNION
SELECT Quizzes.Description as title
FROM Quizzes JOIN Assessors ON Quizzes.AssessorId = Assessors.AssessorID
WHERE Assessors.name = "Professor Smith"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/education#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/education/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?o0 WHERE {
  {
    ?exams a :Exams .
    ?assessors a :Assessors .
    ?exams p:hasAssessors ?assessors .
    ?exams p:CourseTitle ?coursetitle .
    ?assessors p:name ?name_f .
    FILTER(STR(?name_f) = "Professor Smith")
    BIND(?coursetitle AS ?o0)
  }
  UNION
  {
    ?quizzes a :Quizzes .
    ?assessors a :Assessors .
    ?quizzes p:hasAssessors ?assessors .
    ?quizzes p:Description ?description .
    ?assessors p:name ?name_f .
    FILTER(STR(?name_f) = "Professor Smith")
    BIND(?description AS ?o0)
  }
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show exams and quizzes graded by Professor Smith.
